videos.title: IELTS SPEAKING TEST 2017 - DESCRIBE YOUR NEIGHBORS
videos.description:

The IELTS Speaking Exam in 2017 has new questions. These questions include a number of questions about neighbors. This video and the transcript will help you talk about:

videos.title: IELTS Speaking Part 2: Describe a Childhood Neighborhood
videos.description:
Join me for my IELTS Speaking Part 2 series as I tackle the task of describing a childhood neighborhood. Watch the model answer and learn useful phrases to express yourself confidently.
